title: Honor Quests
description:
Have you ever wished to have giant swords in minecraft?

Yea i know it's not a new thing but hear me out, Claymores, Katanas, Claws, Waraxes
body:
Geckolib required

Have you ever wished to have giant swords in minecraft?

Yea i know it's not a new thing but hear me out, Claymores, Katanas, Claws, Waraxes

Katanas making you faster, claws giving a short dash, the powerful strikes of both the Claymore and the Waraxe,

and my favorite...

BOOMERANGS!! 

 

yea they don't come back when thrown... yet.. 

 

In the new additions we got 3 new small structures, including an underground one, one new tier below diamond and above iron,

being bronze, made with the new findable tin mineral, that normally will take a lot of time to mine, but.. hey there!

Flint axe being a new ALL IN ONE tool, useful for mining tin and above stone.

Using Copper you can now make a OP copper drill, made in the advanced creation bench (also works as a furnace)

A little bit of QOL in the too, like being able to cook rotten flesh?, sunflower seeds, cooking cooked flesh into leather..

 

MASSIVE UPDATE 1.1.0!!

-NEW STEEL MATERIAL can be obtained by smelting iron ingots in a blast furnace, 4092 durability, same efficiency as diamond but really low enchantability, 0.5 more damage than iron, great for builders and can be used to craft armor, tools and weapons must be crafted in the advanced creation bench

-Copper claymores, katanas, waraxes and claws added!

-Waraxes buffed to match their damage/speed output. (+1 damage to each tier)

 

Mod also includes advancements, so you can feel epic when crafting... the infinity...

 

Mod is heavily recommended to be played with the Better combat mod
